message:
fix: Add missing expression handlers (set, await_expr, named_expr) to AST traversal

Added handlers for set literals, await expressions, and walrus operator
(named_expr) to expression traversal functions:
- variable_usage.zig: isNameUsedInExpr
- async_complexity.zig: analyzeExpr
- expressions.zig: analyzeExpressions
- closures.zig: findUsedVars
